PlayerVisibility.Name: Player Shop Visibility
PlayerVisibility.Hint: Controls whether players can browse shop inventory directly.

BuybackRate.Name: Default Buyback Rate
BuybackRate.Hint: Default percentage of base price offered when players sell items (0.50 = 50%).

AutoDetectPartyLevel.Name: Auto-Detect Party Level
AutoDetectPartyLevel.Hint: Automatically calculate average party level from active player characters.

ManualPartyLevel.Name: Manual Party Level
ManualPartyLevel.Hint: Set party level manually when auto-detect is disabled.

EnableBias.Name: Enable Shopkeeper Bias
EnableBias.Hint: Allow shopkeepers to occasionally generate with negative biases against certain races or classes.
